title: Project Babylon Materials
description: This is a CORE for Project Babylon Mods series, adding materials, ores and some custom crafting.
body:
![project_babylon_materials_logo_big](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/91e8aec642532095687a81387090a8b079731048.png)


![space](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/34ccc604bf424d08bb54e403c43a460ee3faaf3c.png)

**Welcome to the Project Babylon Mod Series. This is a series, that tries to provide, combine and create a new and fresh experience.**


![space](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/34ccc604bf424d08bb54e403c43a460ee3faaf3c.png)



**Project Babylon Materials is the first of the mods, that uses to be a core of other Project Babylon Mods.**


Project Babylon Materials provide:


**NEW ORES**


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**Ruby Ore**
![ruby_ore](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/213e76e641f27028a98c8a293ba93efc344861cf.png)



**Magical Ice Ore**
![magical_ice_ore](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dcd57304198afcbf9d28abc1e93867dff8cd8346.png)
</details>



**NEW MATERIALS**


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**Dusts**
![dusts](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd846c73186152ed52a3a55599d3c77fbc119775.png)


**Metals**
![metals](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f2a022a92686fda144cca283f0fff0f4b6eb6b64.png)
</details>


**NEW BLOCKS**


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**Blocks**
![blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3379472b5fb25ac162547e9ae2702eb2a8c3abe9.png)

</details>


**NEW TOOLS**


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**Smith Hammers**
![smith_hammers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e6e78b60bb7ba6546fd68e7a7783a703dbdcf812.png)


**Smith Hammer Recipe Example**


![hammers_recipe_example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c01dd13ccf4daf1a4e20ea2ff17279fedababf2.png)


**Bowl And Mortar**
![bowl_and_mortar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f0f12fe043da165af492991e1abf07d5f911c379.png)


**Bowl And Mortar Recipe Example**

![bowl_and_mortar_recipe_example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1f7cb7c5b3cae4ef2a4684e7294c336486c2890c.png)
</details>



**NEW CRAFTING STATION - Magical Infuser**

Magical Infuser is a new crafting station that uses "Magic Dust" to let you combine materials and make new ones.


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![magical_infuser](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/edf0e76cbf92010b903d863d0ffa104187267058.png)


**Magical Infuser Craft Recipe Example*
![magical_infuser_crafting_example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9d45b28c58ce739d3a5c20a60692147fe59ccc6f.png)
</details>
